base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of character_select — a ui (menu_screen) from 1989 final fight. Player-select screen — 3 character portraits (Cody/Guy/Haggar) + stat-bars + insert-coin prompt. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Player-select screen — 3 character portraits (Cody/Guy/Haggar) + stat-bars + insert-coin prompt
